mission_09: WITH spend AS (SELECT c.region, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.region ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) DESC) AS rn FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY c.region, c.name) SELECT region, name, total_spend FROM spend WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY region;
